metadata.explanation: This code defines the `TodoItem` Pydantic model. It includes fields for `id` (a UUID with a default factory for easy generation), `title`, `description`, and `completed` status. Field validations are added for `title` and `description`. The `model_config` is used to provide `json_schema_extra`, which helps generate a clear example in the OpenAPI (Swagger UI) documentation for better understanding of the expected data structure. This adheres to Pydantic V2 best practices.
